creator: 000.fbsd@quip.cz
text:
Created attachment 183162
new port shar of Kibana Search Guard plugin

This is port of Kibana 5 plugin Search Guard
https://github.com/floragunncom/search-guard-kibana-plugin

It works but it is a first time I created port so it should be carefully checked by a committer.

It passed "poudriere testport"

BTW I am not sure how to use PORTVERSION / PORTREVISION if the plugin version is "5.3.0-2" so I used 5.3.0 only.
